description: Global Stress Matrix - world equity and bond-market stress. Blends a 10-market price-action matrix with credit spreads (HY/IG OAS), implied volatility (VIX) and cross-market contagion into a Global Stress Index; adds breadth, momentum and safe-haven demand.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Global Stress Matrix - every 6h via EventBridge Scheduler, re-scoring equity and bond stress across global markets as price action updates.
